case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JUAN MANUEL LOPEZ HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,517.49 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JUAN MANUEL LOPEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $20.00) SERVED APR-29-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JUAN MANUEL LOPEZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JUAN MANUEL LOPEZ HERNANDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JUAN MANUEL LOPEZ $1,517.49 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,617.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
